pluginDescription: Start this operator's CQ automation at scheduled local times or fixed intervals.
scheduledCqOverviewDesc: You can use fixed times and fixed intervals together. CQ only starts when this operator is idle.
scheduledCqEnabledDesc: When enabled, the fixed-time and interval settings below start CQ automation.
scheduledCqTasksDesc: Each task uses local system time. Days accept daily, mon-fri, sat,sun, or 1-5 where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday. Leave empty if you only want interval CQ.
scheduledCqIntervalEnabledDesc: Start CQ at a fixed interval. This can be used together with fixed-time tasks.
scheduledCqIntervalMinutesDesc: How many minutes to wait between CQ attempts. After enabling, the first interval CQ waits for one full interval.
